site.title: Psychotherapy in Mexico City & Online | Patricio Ruiz — psychosomatic approach
site.description: Individual, couples, and family therapy with a psychosomatic and systemic approach in Mexico City and online. Book your first session with Patricio Ruiz Abrín.

hero.label: Psychotherapy · Mexico City & Online
hero.title: Therapeutic support with a relational and psychosomatic approach.
hero.subtitle: Individual, couples, and family therapy sessions, plus group workshops. In-person in Mexico City and online.

approach.label: The approach
approach.title: What is psychosomatic therapy and how can it help you?
approach.p1: Psychosomatic therapy draws on the connection between body, heart, and mind — and how our experiences become physically stored within us. In session, we gently and precisely explore and heal that connection: how the nervous system responds, what the body holds on to, and what needs processing so you can feel balanced again.
approach.p2: My work helps you gain clarity of thought, emotion, and action, reduce anxiety levels, and better manage the stress that accumulates in your body. My ultimate goal is to empower you so that you don't depend on therapy to stay self-regulated.
approach.link: Learn about the techniques I use

individual.title: Individual Therapy
individual.desc: Teens and adults. Processes to reconnect with your body, listen to and process your emotions, and support you in deciding and taking action from a clearer place.

couples.title: Couples Therapy
couples.desc: I help each partner pay attention to the bond from a place of individual responsibility, while opening up to embrace the emotional experience — and pain — of the other. A process that weaves compassion with attention.

family.title: Family Therapy
family.desc: I support families so their members can listen to each other more equitably, and from within the system, new solutions to shared challenges can emerge.

podcast.label: A gift for you
podcast.title: Listen to my podcast: what psychosomatic therapy is all about
podcast.desc: An episode that explains in depth what my therapeutic approach focuses on and how it works.
podcast.privacy: I'll only contact you with information about my therapy. You can unsubscribe at any time.
podcast.thanksNote: We also sent the link to your email.

cta.title: Ready to take the first step?
cta.desc: Every process is different and begins with a conversation. Share your concerns with me and we'll see if my support can be helpful.

footer.contactDesc: If you have any questions or want to book a session, get in touch. Email me or
footer.emergency: If you have an emergency or your life is in danger, call 911 or your local emergency line.
